Rationale: Projection_RMS has the strongest LOOGO AUC=0.771008403 and accuracy=0.755555556 with simple physical meaning.
Projection_LowAccelerationMean has similar LOOGO accuracy=0.755555556 and AUC=0.762605042 but is less general than full Projection_RMS.
The first composite score underperforms: LOOGO accuracy=0.577777778 and AUC=0.663865546.
LOOGO is a useful first sanity check but still reuses the same Paper 1 label set and source context.
